{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324115506FFB1D6B7F3183EAFC5B7\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617489220783915801","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书超好看，人物描述细腻，文字思路清晰，文字功底非常棒。与其他大部分小说不一样，𣎴是描写人物是怎么勾心斗角，怎样斗来斗去的，而是描写人物怎样在自己的工作岗位上努力工作并取得成绩的，非常好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773587993,"group_id":"7569928511029267518","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxU/YjGyvspBol87yRcwKWQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"95713650984","user_name":"喜欢树獭的徐一道"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95713650984","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7569928511029267518","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一本底层大学生升迁的秘笈，更是初入职场必备的智慧全书！\n出身贫寒没有背景的的师范毕业生李文戈，因为一个纯属偶然的机遇，进入了市人事局机关，一路逆袭！\n本书虽写官场，但没有以往官场的剑拔弩张，没有双方那种你死我活的斗争，而是把官场当职场，在一种平和的心态中，把做人、做事、做官有机结合在一起。本书包含《李文戈升官记》、《中流击水》。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9e645efd3c5b6ae15115146a217a4820~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"孙浩","author_id":"","book_id":"7569928511029267518","book_name":"李文戈升官记（全二册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8b088","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2309人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":970,\"name\":\"精品小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970\u0026name=精品小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":2,\"name\":\"都市生活\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=2\u0026name=都市生活\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7569929656938286105","read_count":"404","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"311534"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"54","tags":"精品小说,都市生活","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9e645efd3c5b6ae15115146a217a4820~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779508507\u0026x-signature=T0yvFoeR0k0ozt3fpAYiO%2B9lZPM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324115506FFB1D6B7F3183EAFC5B7\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6132,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7569928511029267518","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":16,"score_text":"16人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"20260324115506FFB1D6B7F3183EAFC5B7","message":"请求成功"}
